elements.name: nova-template
elements.description: Internal marker consumed by NovaCanvas. Usually generated by the Nova Vite compiler.

vue-components.name: NovaCanvas
vue-components.description: Vue host component that creates a NovaApp, mounts compiled Nova DSL from its default slot and exposes overlay slots.

props.name: canvas-label
props.description: Accessible canvas label and default DevTools label.

props.name: width
props.description: Canvas stage width. Number values are treated as pixels.

props.name: height
props.description: Canvas stage height. Number values are treated as pixels.

props.name: mount
props.description: Static path to a `.nova` entrypoint component. The Nova compiler turns it into a mounted `nova-template` marker.

props.name: props
props.description: Plain props bridge forwarded to the mounted `.nova` entrypoint and updated without remounting.

props.name: maxDpr
props.description: Maximum device pixel ratio used by Nova canvas sizing.

props.name: surfaceName
props.description: Name for the root Nova surface created by NovaCanvas.

props.name: plugins
props.description: Schema plugins registered before template mount, for example `registerNovaUIKit`.

props.name: appOptions
props.description: Additional NovaApp create options: renderer, scheduler, input, sound, theme and debug.

props.name: padding
props.description: Root padding forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: background
props.description: Root background forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: border
props.description: Root border forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: clip
props.description: Root clip flag forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: rootId
props.description: Root component id for the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: rootClassName
props.description: Root className forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper. Responsive tokens such as `hidden md:shown md:box` are valid when NovaCSS provides matching utilities/classes.

props.name: styleSheet
props.description: NovaCSS stylesheet source or asset forwarded to the implicit Root wrapper.

props.name: devtools
props.description: Enable/disable Nova DevTools registration or override DevTools id/label.

events.name: ready
events.description: Emitted after NovaApp, surface, canvas, root node and scope are created.

events.name: destroy
events.description: Emitted when NovaCanvas destroys its runtime.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Inline Nova DSL. The Nova Vite compiler rewrites this slot into `#nova` with a `nova-template` marker.

slots.name: nova
slots.description: Compiled Nova template marker slot generated by the compiler.

slots.name: overlay
slots.description: Regular Vue overlay content rendered above the canvas stage.

vue-components.name: nova-template
vue-components.description: Internal marker consumed by NovaCanvas. Usually generated by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: src
props.description: Path to a `.nova` source file.

props.name: component
props.description: Compiled Nova component constructor.

props.name: source
props.description: Debug source path.

props.name: debug-id
props.description: Debug identifier.

props.name: options
props.description: Template options forwarded to the compiled component.

props.name: data
props.description: Template data forwarded to the compiled component.
